deploy.startCommand: /bin/bash -lc 'set -e; export PGPASSWORD="${PGPASSWORD}"; if ! psql -h "${PGHOST}" -p "${PGPORT}" -U "${PGUSER}" -d "${PGDATABASE}" -tc "SELECT 1 FROM ir_module_module LIMIT 1" >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "DB init: -i base on ${PGDATABASE}"; /entrypoint.sh odoo --db_sslmode=require --database odoo-19-e1 -i base --without-demo=True --stop-after-init; fi; exec /entrypoint.sh odoo --http-port="${PORT:-8069}" --db_sslmode=require --proxy-mode --database odoo-19-e1 --without-demo=True --smtp="${ODOO_SMTP_HOST}" --smtp-port="${ODOO_SMTP_PORT_NUMBER}" --smtp-user="${ODOO_SMTP_USER}" --smtp-password="${ODOO_SMTP_PASSWORD}" --email-from="${ODOO_EMAIL_FROM}"'
